description: Send a single file to a remote address. Automatically negotiates QUIC or HTTP protocol. Returns immediately with a task_id; use get_transfer_status to poll progress.

content_type.description:
Override the auto-sniffed content type (skip the magic-byte
sniffer).

lifecycle.description:
Lifecycle hint: one of `transient | durable | ephemeral`.
Hints are not enforced by AeroSync in v0.2.

mcp_auth_token.description: Local MCP auth token. Required only when the server has `AEROSYNC_MCP_SECRET` set.

metadata.description:
User metadata as a flat JSON object of `key=value` strings.
Example: `{"tenant": "acme", "agent": "cleaner"}`. Values must
be UTF-8 strings; binary payloads must be base64-encoded by
the caller (RFC-003 §10 Q2).

no_verify.description: Skip the end-to-end SHA-256 integrity check (default: false).

parent_file_ids.description:
Lineage: ids of files that produced this one. Maps to
`metadata.parent_file_ids`.

source.description: Absolute or relative path to the source file.

token.description: Optional auth token for the remote receiver (HMAC-SHA256 bearer). Distinct from `mcp_auth_token`.
